full_response:
Step-by-step solution

1.  Set-up  
 • The log runs from –500 in to +500 in.  
 • Allie starts at 0 and first walks in the + direction to +500, then turns around and walks in the – direction until she finds the crumb.  
 • The crumb is at –20 in.  
 • Terry starts at 0 and, knowing the location, walks directly to –20 in.

2.  Distance Allie walks  
 a. From 0 to +500 ⇒ 500 in.  
 b. From +500 back to 0 ⇒ 500 in.  
 c. From 0 to –20    ⇒  20 in.  

 Total for Allie: 500 + 500 + 20 = 1020 in.

3.  Distance Terry walks  
 Directly from 0 to –20: 20 in.

4.  Ratio  
 (Allie’s distance) / (Terry’s distance) = 1020 / 20 = 51.

\boxed{51}

Confidence: 0.86
